content.en:
"Infinite Master, I don't dare to lie to you!"

The Frontier Fire Master said in fear.

Soon, Ye Tian took the Border Fire Controller to a canyon in the inner circle of the wasteland, where there was a wasteland forbidden life comparable to the level of the Nine Realms level master.

Before, the controller of the border fire just didn't dare to forcibly rush in, otherwise he was afraid that he would not be able to escape, so he attracted Ye Tian and the others to come, and then attracted the attention of this wasteland forbidden life.

After all, there is no wisdom in the wasteland forbidden life, and it is easy to draw it out.

It's a pity that his plan was seen through by Ye Tian.

"This is it!"

The Flame Keeper pointed to the canyon not far away.

Ye Tian looked over, this canyon was filled with countless wasteland aura, and coupled with the fact that this was the outer part of the wasteland, it was naturally extremely dangerous.

Now.

Ye Tian controlled his aura and also covered the aura of the person in control of the border fire, otherwise if he appeared here, he would immediately be attacked by the forbidden life of the wasteland.

Ye Tian used his replication talent to spy on the interior of this canyon and sensed the forbidden life of the wasteland.

Wasteland forbidden life is also gifted, and thus can be perceived by replication talents.

After Ye Tian investigated, he confirmed that there was only one wasteland forbidden life here, proving that the border fire controller was not lying.

Immediately.

Ye Tian directly probed this canyon with his direct will!

Rumble!!!!

His will broke through the layers of the wasteland aura and sensed the situation inside the canyon.

Suddenly, he sensed a spring in the depths of the canyon, which was full of golden spring water, and it was a large amount of primordial spiritual spring liquid.

And not far from this primordial spiritual spring, there is a primordial Dao tree.

"Sure enough, it's true!"

Ye Tian muttered.

At this time, the forbidden life of the wasteland sensed it and immediately chased after it.

"The controller of the border fire, you didn't lie to me, I let you go according to the agreement!"

Ye Tian said.

"Let it go...... Me?"

The Border Fire Controller was stunned and immediately despaired.

"No, Infinite Master, you can't do that!!"

The Border Fire Controller understood Ye Tian's plan, which was to kill him with the help of the Wasteland Forbidden Life's hand.

Now.

He was sealed with power, and Ye Tian fled directly, he had to face a wasteland forbidden life with the strength of a Nine Realm-level master, he couldn't resist at all, and he couldn't escape.

At the moment when Ye Tian fled, a big hand grabbed and directly crushed the one hand of the border fire controller, and the body of control was completely annihilated by the power of the wasteland.

An Eight Realm-level master fell in an instant!

......

"The Frontier Fire Master has fallen!"

Ye Tian didn't have any expression, he was not a benevolent person, and if the person in control of the border fire dared to pit him, he had to have a plan to fall.

Moreover, he didn't want the news of his acquisition of the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid and the Primordial Dao Tree to spread, so he could only let the Border Fire Controller die.

He himself would not break his promise to kill the master of the border fire, but throwing him and not saving him is not a breach of promise.

After the death of the border fire master, Ye Tian turned around and killed the canyon.

At this time, the forbidden life of that wasteland immediately came to stop Ye Tian.

"Look for death!"

Ye Tian no longer kept his hand, holding the Will Blade Knife in his hand, and used the top-level Origin Control Technique Time and Space Splitting Blade.

Poof!

A single knife directly slashed away the forbidden life of this wasteland.

In terms of strength, it is comparable to the fifth-layer combat power of the primordial level, not as good as Ye Tian.

Of course, just one move won't kill it at all.

And Ye Tian was not going to kill it, the main thing was that it was difficult to kill it.

Moreover, once he fought here, it would be easy to usher in other wasteland forbidden lifeforms in the depths of the wasteland, and if he attracted a terrifying wasteland forbidden life comparable to that of a ten-realm-level master, he would be dead.

Therefore, his goal was only to seize the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid and the Primordial Dao Tree here.

After splitting the forbidden life of the wasteland again, Ye Tian cast nine flashes of thunder body and came to the Primal Spirit Spring.

"Collect !!"

A drop of the primordial spiritual spring liquid was caught by Ye Tian.

There is a huge problem with the Primal Spiritual Spring Liquid, that is, it is extremely heavy, and it is difficult to collect too much at once, so it must be collected drop by drop.

Drops of Primal Spiritual Spring liquid fell into Ye Tian's hands, and the wasteland forbidden life was furious and desperately killed.

Thundered!!!!

The battle continued to fight, and Ye Tian collected the primordial spirit spring liquid every once in a while.

This spring of primordial spiritual spring liquid seemed to be a lot, but it was actually collected by Ye Tian after a while, and only that primordial Dao tree remained.

It was a bit difficult to pull up the Primal Dao Tree, so Ye Tian gave up the attack and chose to endure the attacks of the forbidden life of the wasteland.

A large amount of wasteland aura invaded Ye Tian's body, but he didn't care about it, he directly pulled up this Primal Dao tree, put it away, and then forcibly left.

And just as Ye Tian came out of the canyon, a terrifying wasteland forbidden life emerged, locking Ye Tian one after another.

"Not good!"

Ye Tian knew that he had stabbed the big basket, no wonder no Eternal Controller dared to fight in the depths of the wasteland, it was indeed too dangerous here.

Escape!

Ye Tian didn't say a word, and directly chose to escape.

And these wasteland forbidden beings have no IQ and are directly hunted down.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian had endured attack after attack, if he hadn't had the Devouring Mountain physique, he could absorb damage, otherwise he would have hung up a long time ago.

However, even so, the erosion of the wasteland aura did not hurt him a lot.

Along the way, Ye Tian was chased and killed by a group of wasteland forbidden beings, which naturally attracted the attention of the other eternal masters.

"Oh no, there is an Eternal Master who has provoked the forbidden life of the wasteland in the inner perimeter!"

The other Eternal Masters were frightened and began to flee as well.

......

"That's the Endless Master, how did he provoke the forbidden life of the inner wasteland, isn't this looking for death?"

Feng Heng's controller frowned.

In an instant, he quickly shuttled away, not going to look for the Border Fire Master here, this place is too dangerous, in case he is also targeted by the forbidden life of the wasteland inside the wasteland, his will clone will be finished.

A moment passed.

Ye Tian, who was injured, escaped from the wasteland, and immediately he quickly shuttled towards the Origin Realm Sea.

As for those forbidden lives in the wasteland, they couldn't leave the wasteland, so they all returned to the depths of the wasteland.
